title: FCP/Spinoff
description: The smaller cousin of the FCP packs!
body:
# The Spinoff
Just a smaller version of the _**Freaking Crazy Pack (FCP)**_

As a spinoff to the other packs this also features:
-  More bosses
-  More dimensions
-  More biomes
-  More weapons 
-  Revamped world generation (overworld, nether, end)
-  Much, much, much vibes.

## Major Mods
**World Generation**
- [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic)
- [Repurposed Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge)
- [IDAS](https://modrinth.com/mod/idas)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [Town and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers)

**Dimensions**
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies)
- [The Midnight](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-midnight)
- [The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden)

**Mobs**
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
- [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
- [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm)

**Miscellaneous**
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- [Rats](https://modrinth.com/mod/rats)
